titleStmt.title: SII 18.68: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 68. (B.K. No. 36 of 1933-34.) YARAGUPPI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the left wall of the temple of Nārāyaṇadēva.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva is dated in Śaka 985, Sōbhakṛit, Pushya śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Samkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1062, December 8, Sunday, f.d.t. 18. The Saṁkrānti did not occur on that day.

It registers a grant of land made by the Two-hundred Mahājanas, Aṟuvattokkalu Paṭṭagāṟa-sameya and others, to the charity well (arabāvi) constructed by Kēs11imayya at Eraguppe. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mārarasa is stated to be governing the Two Six-hundreds (division). Manneya Indrakēsiyarasa of Maṇaleyara family and ūroḍeya Nākarasa are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maḥ svasti jayaścābhyudayaśca śrī śrī
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvara rājya(ṁ)muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhāvana gandhavāraṇaṁ maiḷala
dēviyaṁkakāṟaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ mārarasa Eraḍaṟunūṟumaṁ sukha saṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire . samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ maṇaleyarānvayaprasūta purikarapuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmanmanneyaṁ Iṁdrakēsiya
rasa . sakavarṣa 985 neya sōbhakritsaṁvatsarada pauṣyasuddha 5 Ādityavāra duttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpāta
dandu . vṛtta . vinayāṁbhōnidhi vipravaṁśatiḷakaṁ śrīnāgadēvāryyanātana putraṁ vibhu sōvarājanuditādityaprabhaṁ
tatsutaṁ vinutōdyadyaśanāśritāmarakujaṁ grāmādhipaṁ śaucasajjanavaṁdyaṁ prabhu nākiyanvayamiḷālōkastu
taṁ dhātriyoḷ . kanda . nītividanamaḷacaritaṁ khyātānvayanabjabhavakuḷāṁbaratigma dyōtiyene negaḻda peṁpiṁ mātēṁ
grāmādhināyakaṁ nākarasaṁ . samastaguṇasampannaṁ nuḍidu mattennaṁ nāḷge nallātaṁ pusiyilladātaṁ vīrāṁganālalāṭa
paṭṭaṁ birudagharaṭṭaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ śaucagāṁgēyaṁ nannikandarppa piridīyalārppa vipuḷacaritraṁ gōtrapavi
traṁ birudara tōḷgali śrīmadūroḍeyaṁ nākarasa . kanda . Ajavaṁśōttama pātrarssujanāgraṇigaḷsama
staśāstrajñaraghabrajasaṁhārar śiṣṭēṣṭajanādhārarmmahātmaresevinnūrvvar . yama niyamasvādhyā
yadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇar viditavēdavidyāpāragar ṣaṭkarmaniratar saptasōmasaṁ
sthāvabhṛtāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtōttamāṁgaranēkaśāstrasmṛtipurāṇaṣaṭtarkkavāgvibhūṣaṇa rāśri
tajanakaḷpavṛkṣarēkavākyar dvātriṁśatsahaśrasameyāgragaṇyaragaṇyapuṇyamūrttigaḷa
ppa śrīmaderaguppeya Innūrvvaru gāvuṇḍu Aṟuvattokkaluṁ . vṛtta . vitatayaśapratāpa
rāśritakaḷpamahījarāntaraṁ hatiyipa śūrarunnataguṇāvaśatharssamayāgragaṇya rūrjjita
mahimāspadarssadayadānavinōdaraśēṣaśiṣṭasaṁgatarene peṁpaḍedoreṁto dhāriṇiyoḷ sale paṭṭa
gāṟaru . kandaṁ . nākadinamarāpage bhūlōkakkavatarisidudu bhagīrathanindeṁbī katheya kēḷdu kēḷveṁ prā
kaṭamāytīgaḷeḷege kēsavaninda . vṛtta . gaṁgāsindhupravāhaṁ janiyisidudu satpuṇyadiṁ kēsigī
prōttuṁgakhyātiprabhāvaṁ pasarisuvinegaṁ kūpadākāradindaṁ śringāraṁ betta dharmmē tamanabhinutamaṁ
vāridhāraughadindaṁ māṁgalyaṁ phoṇmitēṁ celvesududo dharegī sanda dharmmānurāgaṁ kanda . vitatayaśanarasi
mayyaṁge tanūjaṁ māḷimayyavibhuvakhiḷaguṇānvite tatkuḷanāriyarundhatiyenisida māṇikabbe
vanitāratna . tattaneya kauṇḍilyakuḷōttamanene negaḻda kēśimayyaprabhu sadvṛttana rabāvi
yaṁ viḷasattējaṁ parahitārtthamaṁ māḍisidaṁ . Antūroḍeyapramukhamahājana vinnū
rvvaruṁ gāvuṇḍu Aṟuvattokkaluṁ paṭṭagāṟasameya samūhamumiḻdu śrī maderagu
ppeya Arabāvige biṭṭa bhūmiyūriṁ paḍuvalūroḍeyara mānyadiṁ baḍaga beṇneya paḷḷa
diṁ mūḍa pāḷapasugeyiṁ teṁkalirppattu gēṇa gaḷeyalirppattaydu mattarmānyadoḷage bāvi
ya mūḍaleraḍu mattarantu Irppattēḷu mattarumaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ gāmuṇḍa gēriyiṁ
teṁkaṇa taḍada viḷkayya maneyuṁ sarvvanamasyadiṁ kādu pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁge gaṁgā sāgara
prayāge vāraṇāsiyargghyatīrttha kurukṣētradoḷsāsirvvarbrāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileyuṁ
sāsira gadyāṇa ponnumaṁ dānaṁ goṭṭa phaḷamumaśvamēdhaṁ geyda phaḷamumakkuṁ . Idana ḷidaṁga
vaḷiye kaḍegaṇisidaṁgā mahātīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsira kavileyuṁ sāsira brāhmaṇarumane
ḷkōṭi tapōdhanarumanaḷida pātakanuṁ paṁcamahāpātakanumāgi narakakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiguṁ
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvā nētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti vasundha rāṁ ṣaṣṭi
rvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . baḍagi cāvaṇḍana manegaṁ jīvadhanakkaṁteṟe
yarddha dāna .
Digital edition of SII 18.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
